items.markdown:
Himalayan salt panels are `modular wellness and decor products made from compressed or solid Himalayan pink salt bricks, often used to create illuminated "salt walls"` . They are popular in **saunas, spas, yoga studios, and home offices** for their aesthetic glow and purported air-purifying benefits.[[1]](https://sunvalleysalt.com/blogs/news/salt-panels-everything-you-need-to-know#:~:text=The%20negative%20ions%20released%20by,affect%20your%20overall%20mental%20state.)[[2]](https://www.selrox.com/post/himalayan-pink-salt-wall#:~:text=Pink%20Salt%20Bricks:%20These%20rectangular,modern%2C%20or%20eclectic%20interior%20designs.)[[3]](https://sunvalleysalt.com/pages/himalayan-salt-wall-panels#:~:text=The%20salt%20panels%20create%20elegant%20work%20station,red%20Himalayan%20Salt%20Wall%20in%20a%20gym.)[[4]](https://sunvalleysalt.com/pages/himalayan-salt-wall-panels#:~:text=As%20an%20industry%20leader%2C%20Sun,a%20reception%20and%20conference%20areas.)[[5]](https://www.webmd.com/balance/himalayan-salt-lamps)

Key Benefits & Functions

- **Air Purification** : Using a process called **hygroscopy** , the salt attracts moisture and trapped pollutants (dust, allergens) from the air.
- **Natural Ionization** : When heated—either by a sauna's temperature or internal LED lighting—the salt releases **negative ions** . These are thought to neutralize "electronic smog" from devices and improve mood.
- **Respiratory Support** : Often used for **halotherapy** (salt therapy), these panels can help clear mucus and reduce inflammation in the airways.
- **Aesthetics (Chromotherapy)** : The warm amber and pink glow (600–700nm wavelength) helps signal the brain to wind down, making them ideal for relaxation zones.[[1]](https://www.pinksaltwall.com/blogs/salt-wall/himalayan-salt-tiles-benefits#:~:text=In%20conclusion%2C%20Himalayan%20salt%20tiles,fresh%2C%20purified%20air%20they%20provide.)[[2]](https://sunvalleysalt.com/blogs/news/salt-panels-everything-you-need-to-know#:~:text=Benefits%20salt%20panels%20provides,and%20fresh%20to%20breathe%20in.)[[3]](https://www.saltability.com/pages/himalayan-salt-walls#:~:text=To%20counteract%20those%20excessive%20positive,through%20socially%2C%20environmentally%20responsible%20manufacturing.)[[4]](https://selectsalt.com/halotherapy/himalayan-salt-panels-from-wellness-to-aesthetic-brilliance/#:~:text=The%20Wellness%20Aspect:%20Benefits%20of,stress%2C%20and%20promote%20better%20sleep.)[[5]](https://www.salussaunas.com/blogs/blog/himalayan-salt-bricks-for-sauna#:~:text=engages%20every%20sense.-,Supercharge%20Your%20Detox%20with%20Halotherapy,%22toothbrush%22%20for%20your%20airways.)[[6]](https://www.saltean.com/himalayan-salt-tiles/)[[7]](https://www.selrox.com/post/himalayan-pink-salt-wall#:~:text=Pink%20Salt%20Bricks:%20These%20rectangular,modern%2C%20or%20eclectic%20interior%20designs.)

Product Options & Pricing

Prices vary significantly based on whether you are buying individual tiles or pre-assembled, backlit panels. As of March 2026:[[1]](https://www.fabglassandmirror.com/blog/everything-about-salt-lamps/#:~:text=Himalayan%20salt%20lamps%20are%20available%20for%20a,prices%20also%20vary%20from%20manufacturer%20to%20manufacturer.)[[2]](https://havenofheat.com/blogs/sauna-guides/himalayan-salt-in-saunas)[[3]](https://www.etsy.com/listing/750319094/himalayan-salt-wall-panel-with-led)[[4]](https://www.saltchamberinc.com/blog/how-to-build-a-himalayan-salt-wall#:~:text=These%20panels%20start%20at%20approximately%20$1%2C000%20for,salt%20bricks%20present%20a%20more%20affordable%20alternative.)

- **Individual Tiles/Bricks** : Usually sold in packs (e.g., 10-pack of 8"x4"x2" tiles) for building custom walls.
- **Pre-assembled Panels** : Often 24"x12" or 16"x18" in size, featuring interlocking systems and optional LED lighting.[[1]](https://www.amazon.com/Himalayan-Pink-Salt-Tiles-x4/dp/B0F88QQ24Z#:~:text=Himalayan%20Pink%20Salt%20Tiles%208%22x4%22x2%22%20%E2%80%93%20Pack,Room%2C%20or%20Wellness%20Center%20Panels%20-%20Amazon.com.)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:14726452737302910872&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:9070965088269163225&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://scandiamfg.com/products/himalayan-salt-panels#:~:text=Himalayan%20Salt%20Wall%20Panels%20One%20salt%20panel,size%20is%2016%22%20wide%20by%2018%22%20long)[[5]](https://finnishsaunabuilders.com/products/scandia-himalayan-salt-wall-panels#:~:text=Whether%20you're%20looking%20to%20enhance%20your%20ambiance,without%20LED%20lighting%20for%20a%20classic%20touch.)

| Product Type[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:14726452737302910872&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:4903283579688055213&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://scandiamfg.com/products/himalayan-salt-panels#:~:text=$225.00%20USD,Quantity)[[4]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:7140153925007176577,catalogid:12751530502885551510,gpcid:5809168640582224961&ibp=oshop)[[5]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:11387458561933155633,catalogid:15557038904456355581,gpcid:3843343469755134396,mid:576462901303760994&ibp=oshop)[[6]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:10911879095790173964&ibp=oshop) | Estimated Price Range | Source Example |
|---|---|---|
| **Individual Wall Tile (6"x8")** | ~$40 - $55 | [Haven Of Heat](https://havenofheat.com/products/himalayan-salt-wall-brick?currency=USD&variant=42377100329125&utm_source=google&utm_medium=cpc&utm_campaign=Google%20Shopping&stkn=9e3f71a6a9b6) |
| **Small Backlit Panel (24"x12")** | ~$150 - $400 | Etsy / [Scandia MFG](https://scandiamfg.com/products/himalayan-salt-panels) |
| **Sauna Wall Panel Kit** | ~$276 - $390 | [Cedar Sense](https://cedar-sense.com/product/himalayan-salt-wall-panels/?attribute_led-option=No+Lights) / [Saunas.com](https://saunas.com/products/himalayan-salt-panels?variant=32940952584227&country=US&currency=USD&utm_medium=product_sync&utm_source=google&utm_content=sag_organic&utm_campaign=sag_organic) |
| **Premium Large Interlocking Panels** | ~$2,920+ | [Tekna Store](https://teknastore.com/products/himalayan-salt-wall-panels?variant=46619939307739) |

Installation & Care

- **Mounting** : Panels typically use **adhesive-free** mounting systems or specialized salt-safe glue. They are heavy (approx. **22 lbs per panel** ) and require a sturdy mounting platform like 3/4" wood.
- **Lighting** : For the best effect, use **LED backlighting** . If using RGB LEDs, avoid the full white setting to maintain the salt's natural color benefits.
- **Maintenance** : Keep panels dry; excessive humidity (above 60%) can cause them to "weep" or dissolve. Clean by **dusting with a dry cloth** or a light vacuuming.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:11387458561933155633,catalogid:15557038904456355581,gpcid:3843343469755134396,mid:576462901303760994&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.saltchamberinc.com/blog/how-to-build-a-himalayan-salt-wall#:~:text=This%20is%20an%20excellent%20option,method%20suited%20for%20your%20space.)[[3]](https://am-finn.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/HIMALAYAN_SALT_PANELS_INSTALLATION_GUIDE_AM-FINN.pdf)[[4]](https://sunvalleysalt.com/products/himalayan-salt-panels#:~:text=Warning:%20Do%20not%20place%20Himalayan,when%20using%20RGB%20LED%20lights.)[[5]](https://www.steamsaunabath.com/sites/default/files/2022-02/HAS%20-%20Lightbox%20Salt%20Light.pdf)[[6]](https://sunvalleysalt.com/blogs/news/salt-panels-everything-you-need-to-know#:~:text=There%20are%20two%20ways%20you,Himalayan%20salt%20tiles%20or%20blocks.)[[7]](https://www.instagram.com/reel/DJjil5FPqgM/)
